+    }

+    if (E->Scalars.empty())

```bash
+// Fix for loop vectorization miscompilation with identity operations
```
```bash
+// When a recurrence operation is effectively an identity (e.g., add 0),
+// it should not be treated as a reduction that requires vector reduction intrinsics.
+
+#include "llvm/IR/Instructions.h"
+#include "llvm/IR/Constants.h"
+

+

+  if (BO->getOpcode() != Instruction::Add)
+    return false;
+    
+  // Check if one operand is zero (making this an identity operation)
+  Value *Op0 = BO->getOperand(0);
+  Value *Op1 = BO->getOperand(1);
+  
+  return (isa<ConstantInt>(Op0) && cast<ConstantInt>(Op0)->isZero()) ||
+         (isa<ConstantInt>(Op1) && cast<ConstantInt>(Op1)->isZero());
+}
+
+} // end anonymous namespace
EOF
```
